core_mechanism: self-consistent mean-field closure of an infinite BBGKY-type hierarchy of coupled correlation/moment equations, truncated at one loop into a closed nonlinear equation whose fluctuation term feeds back on the mean field and drives it out of equilibrium
brief_reason: The abstract states the result is obtained by applying the Bogoliubov-Born-Green-Kirkwood-Yvon hierarchy to self-consistent one-loop equations, where the imbalanced creation/annihilation of fluctuations pumps excess energy back into the background — i.e. a self-consistent truncation of a moment hierarchy with feedback from the fluctuation sector.
